title: select_with_fee zero-change fee overcounts outputs — silent mismatch if GRACE_ACTIONS changes
description: select_with_fee always passes sapling_logical_actions(n, 2) assuming 2 outputs (recipient + change), but build_shielded_tx only adds the change output when change > 0. For exact-change txns the builder actually sees 1 output. This works today only because GRACE_ACTIONS=2 floors max(n,1) and max(n,2) identically. The select_with_fee doc explains this but the invariant is easy to miss: if ZIP-317 is revised to reduce GRACE_ACTIONS below 2, or if a contributor changes the output-count assumption without reading the coupling comment, the fee computed by select_with_fee will disagree with FeeRule::standard() inside builder.build(), producing a cryptic rejection. The coupling comment in select_with_fee is the only protection. Hardening: add a debug_assert in build_shielded_tx that verifies selected_fee == actual ZIP-317 fee for the actual output count used.
